steps.title: Find the side length using the volume formula
steps.content:
A cube with side length $s$ has volume $V = s^3$. We need to solve $s^3 = 438,976$ for $s$.

Estimate: Since $70^3 = 343,000$ and $80^3 = 512,000$, the side length is between 70 and 80.

Test $s = 76$:
$$76^2 = 5,776$$
$$76^3 = 5,776 \times 76 = 438,976 \checkmark$$
So $s = 76$.

steps.title: Calculate the surface area
steps.content:
A cube has 6 square faces. The surface area is:
$$A = 6s^2 = 6 \times (76)^2 = 6 \times 5,776 = 34,656 \text{ square units}$$
